name: Turner Law Offices, P.C.
description_short: Turner Law Offices, P.C. is a credit repair provider based in Nashville, Tennessee. Rated 3.3/5 with 137 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Turner Law Offices, P.C. is a credit repair provider serving clients in Nashville, Tennessee. With 137 Google reviews and a 3.3/5.0 rating, Turner Law Offices, P.C. has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a bankruptcy attorney, criminal justice attorney, estate planning attorney, Turner Law Offices, P.C. provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Nashville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Turner Law Offices, P.C. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Nashville, Tennessee area who are considering Turner Law Offices, P.C. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
